* SI ⸢GUB₃⸣-šu₂ ⸢SIG⸣-ma AN x [...]

(o ii 1') (If) its left horn is thin and .. [...]: for 3 years the land of Amurru [...].

o ii 2'2'

MU 3-KAM kurMAR.[TU ...]

o ii 3'3'

* SI ZA₃-šu₂ ⸢kap-ṣa?⸣-[at ...]

(o ii 3') (If) its right horn is bent up [...]: the price of barley will decrease; [...].

o ii 4'4'

GANBA ŠE LA₂ [...]
